code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{getApiBase}from'../api/client';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TOKEN_KEY='st_admin_token';function getToken(){return sessionStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY)||'dev-admin-token';}export default function AdminPage(){const[raw,setRaw]=useState('');const[status,setStatus]=useState('');const[stats,setStats]=useState(null);function load(){const token=getToken();fetch("".concat(getApiBase(),"/api/admin/summary"),{headers:{'X-Admin-Token':token}}).then(r=>r.ok?r.json():Promise.reject(new Error('Unauthorized or server error'))).then(data=>{setStats(data.stats);setRaw(JSON.stringify(data.destinations||[],null,2));setStatus('Loaded from API');}).catch(e=>{setStatus(e.message);});}useEffect(()=>{load();},[]);function setToken(){const t=window.prompt('Admin token (set ADMIN_TOKEN in backend .env)',getToken());if(t)sessionStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,t);load();}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"page page-admin",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Admin \u2014 destinations & stats"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"muted",children:"Reads destination rows from MySQL.
